title: У приміщенні
wb: 3200 K tungsten; 4000–4500 K mixed LED; lock it
shutter: 1/50 in 50 Hz regions; 1/60 in 60 Hz regions
pros: Variable f/2 aperture helps available light
cons: LED flicker and mixed WB are common
mistakes: Using 60 fps in a dim room
tips: Test LEDs at the intended shutter before the event
